prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次约38795→38760→41302→52418→65977，整体呈持续后移趋势，近3年累计后移约2.5万名，2025年基准约65977名；该校在贵州省物理类招生计划2021年79人、2022年77人、2023年85人、2024年91人、2025年113人，逐年扩招；2026年计划122人，较2025年再扩招9人（约+8%）， 计划增加使竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年持续上升（2021年165名→2026年135名），排名提升反映学校综合实力增强，对考 生吸引力有所提升；2022年声誉评价偏负面（宿舍食堂条件改善中），近年未出现重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第58位，评价为「较热」，综合热度约55万，在 211高校中属中等偏上关注度，短视频曝光对报考有一定正向拉动；第五轮学科评估中未获A-及以上评级，学校以农学、医学、师范为传统优势方向，与招生专 业中的临床医学、动物医学、师范类等方向对应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程、临床医学等热门专业社会热度持续偏高；贵州省2026年考生总数约29.9万，按近 年比例估算物理类约20.8万人，较2025年（20.7万）略有增加，竞争小幅加剧；省控线2025年物理类本科批387分，近年波动不大；石河子大学位于新疆，距贵 州较远，地域偏好对贵州考生报考意愿有一定抑制；该校在贵州招生计划逐年增加，2026年物理类122人，占比较小但呈扩招趋势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势 、2026年物理类计划继续扩招约8%、软科排名稳步上升提升学校吸引力、抖音热度中等偏上带来额外关注，以及本省考生规模微增，在2025年基准65977名基础上预计位次继续后 移；预测最低位次约69180名，区间68680–69680名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 38795 → 38760 → 41302 → 52418 → 65977, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 25,000 places in the last 3 years. The 2025 baseline is about 65977. The university's enrollment plan in Guizhou for Physics Category was 79 in 2021, 77 in 2022, 85 in 2023, 91 in 2024, and 113 in 2025, expanding year by year. The 2026 plan is 122, an increase of 9 (about +8%) compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been rising in recent years (165th in 2021 → 135th in 2026), reflecting enhanced overall strength and increased attractiveness to candidates. In 2022, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (dormitory and cafeteria conditions improving), but no major negative incidents have occurred recently. Douyin popularity ranks 58th, rated as 'relatively hot', with a comprehensive popularity of about 550,000, which is moderately high among 211 universities, and short video exposure has a certain positive pull on applications. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, no A- or above rating was obtained. The university's traditional strengths are in agriculture, medicine, and teacher training, corresponding to majors such as clinical medicine, veterinary medicine, and teacher training in the enrollment plan.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Clinical Medicine have consistently high social popularity. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Guizhou is about 299,000, with an estimated Physics Category of about 208,000 based on recent proportions, a slight increase from 2025 (207,000), leading to a small intensification of competition. The provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch in 2025 is 387 points, with little fluctuation in recent years. Shihezi University is located in Xinjiang, far from Guizhou, and regional preference somewhat suppresses the willingness of Guizhou candidates to apply. The university's enrollment plan in Guizhou has been increasing year by year, with 122 in Physics Category in 2026, a small proportion but showing an expansion trend.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the continued expansion of the Physics Category plan by about 8% in 2026, the steady rise in Soft Science rankings enhancing the university's appeal, moderately high Douyin popularity bringing additional attention, and a slight increase in the number of local candidates, based on the 2025 baseline of 65977, the ranking is expected to continue moving backward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 69180, with a range of 68680–69680.

Candidates within the range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors as main choices, Tier 1 majors (Electrical Innovation Class, Stomatology, Clinical Medicine, etc.) as reach goals, and Tier 3 majors (Chemical Engineering, Materials, Civil Engineering, etc.) as safety options. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<68680) can focus on reaching for top Tier 1 majors; those near the lower limit (>69680) are advised to mainly rely on Tier 3 safety options.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 7492 → 6959 → 9287 → 15691 → 11111, showing significant fluctuations. In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform, there was a notable backward shift (15691), but in 2025 it rebounded to 11111, with the most recent baseline around 11111. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Guizhou Province was 12 students in 2021, 14 in 2022, 6 in 2023, 8 in 2024, and 16 in 2025. For 2026, the plan is 14 students, a decrease of 2 students (approximately -12.5%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been steadily rising in recent years (from 165th in 2021 to 135th in 2026), reflecting enhanced overall strength. In 2022, reputation evaluations were somewhat negative (dormitory and cafeteria conditions were being improved), but no major negative incidents have occurred recently. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 58th, rated as 'relatively hot', with a comprehensive popularity of about 550,000, placing it in the upper-middle range of attention among 211 universities. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, it did not receive an A- or higher rating. The university's traditional strengths are in agriculture, medicine, and teacher training, with History Category enrollment majors mainly in teacher training, law, and languages.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Shihezi University is located in Xinjiang, far from Guizhou, and geographical preferences somewhat suppress the willingness of Guizhou candidates to apply. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Guizhou in 2026 is 14 students, a small scale. The law major shows divided social popularity, teacher training majors are also divided, and foreign language majors are generally lukewarm. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Guizhou is approximately 299,000, with an estimated 90,600 in History Category based on recent proportions, a slight increase from 2025 (90,100). The provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 458 points, with little fluctuation in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant fluctuations in historical rankings, the approximately 12.5% reduction in History Category enrollment plan for 2026 easing competition, the steady rise in Soft Science rankings enhancing the university's appeal, and the slight increase in the number of local candidates, the ranking is expected to move slightly forward based on the 2025 baseline of 11111. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 10248, with a range of 9748 to 10748.
